lyric:
["Blue, blue my world is blue
Blue is my world now I'm with- out you
Grey, grey my life is grey
Cold is my heart since you went a- way","Red, red my eyes are red
Cry- ing for you a- lone in my bed

Green, green my jeal- ous heart
I doubt- ed you and ；；；；；
 now we 're a- part

When we met how the bright sun shone
Then love died
Now the rain- bow is gone

Black, black the nights I've known
long- ing for you so lost and a- lone

Blue, blue, my world is blue
Blue is my world now I'm with- out you"]
lyric_text:
Blue, blue my world is blue
Blue is my world now I'm with- out you
Grey, grey my life is grey
Cold is my heart since you went a- wayRed, red my eyes are red
Cry- ing for you a- lone in my bed

Green, green my jeal- ous heart
I doubt- ed you and 
 now we 're a- part

When we met how the bright sun shone
Then love died
Now the rain- bow is gone

Black, black the nights I've known
long- ing for you so lost and a- lone

Blue, blue, my world is blue
Blue is my world now I'm with- out you
